name: ASO Score MCP
description: Scans websites for ASO score across discoverability, identity, trust, commerce, reputation, and memory signals. Returns an Agent Readiness Index (0-100) with per-check evidence and fix plans, per the ASO framework.

skills.name: Agent-readiness scan
skills.description: Scan a website URL and return its ARI score, ASO maturity level, pillar breakdown, and all check results with evidence.

skills.name: ASO fix plan
skills.description: Produce a prioritized remediation plan with ready-to-paste artifact templates (robots.txt AI rules, llms.txt, agent.json, A2A agent card, MCP server card, x402 manifest).
examples: Give me a fix plan to make example.com agent-ready
